questions.question: A hiker mixes $2$ liters of $80%$ ethanol with $3$ liters of $20%$ ethanol. What is the concentration of ethanol in the mixture?

A park ranger wants to mix $15$ kg of birdseed that is $40%$ sunflower seeds with some birdseed that is $80%$ sunflower seeds to get a mixture that is $60%$ sunflower seeds. How many kg of the $80%$ sunflower seeds birdseed should be used?

A fuel tank can hold $1200$ liters of gas. If $800$ liters of $87$ octane gas is already in the tank, how many liters of $93$ octane gas can be added to get a mixture with an average octane rating of $90$?
A scientist is studying a population of rabbits and foxes. If the current ratio of rabbits to foxes is $5:3$ and $50$ more rabbits are introduced, what will be the new ratio of rabbits to foxes?

A group of friends want to mix two types of trail mix. Type A has a ratio of $3:5$ of nuts to fruit and Type B has a ratio of $4:6$ of nuts to fruit. If they mix $2$ kg of Type A with $3$ kg of Type B, what is the ratio of nuts to fruit in the final mixture?

A backpacker has $4$ liters of water that is $10%$ iodine solution. She wants to add some $20%$ iodine solution to get a $15%$ iodine solution. How many liters of the $20%$ iodine solution should she add?
A biologist is studying a population of birds. If the current ratio of birds to nests is $8:5$ and $20$ more nests are built, what will be the new ratio of birds to nests?
A camper has $6$ kg of food that is $20%$ protein. She wants to add some $50%$ protein food to get a $30%$ protein mixture. How many kg of the $50%$ protein food should she add?

A group of hikers are planning a trip and need to mix $10$ kg of $20%$ energy bars with some $40%$ energy bars to get a $30%$ energy bar mixture. If they want to have a total of $15$ kg of energy bars, how many kg of the $40%$ energy bars should they add?

A park is planning to introduce a new species of animal to the park. The current ratio of animals to vegetation is $4:5$. If $100$ more animals are introduced, what will be the new ratio of animals to vegetation? Assume the amount of vegetation remains the same.

teacher_rules: Read each question carefully before answering.
Show all work and explain answers.
Use the space provided for each free response question.
